title: C919 E-TRAS — both LGCUs invalid → conservative WOW=FALSE → S0 hold
description: lgcu_both:invalid forces both LGCU validity bits to FALSE. selected_mlg_wow falls through to the conservative-FALSE branch in the wow-filter (§5.4): without at least one valid LGCU asserting WOW, the system is treated as airborne. State machine stays at S0_AIR_STOWED_LOCKED for the entire run, even though both LGCUs physically report MLG_WOW=True. Verifies the dual-LGCU validity-driven safety floor.

events.note: both LGCUs marked invalid — wow filter cannot trust either, conservative FALSE
pilot pulls into reverse, but state machine never leaves S0
deploy never fires — selected_mlg_wow stays False
CMD2 never goes triggerable because selected_mlg_wow is FALSE
